summary: Director Actions V1 Feature Testing Complete. All 23 backend API tests PASSED (100%). Frontend UI tests verified DirectorActionsCard renders in both Director and Coach Mission Control views, and Pipeline panel opens from Needs Attention card.

integration_issues.issue: Request Review/Escalate buttons not visible in Pipeline panel - likely because athlete's primary_coach_id is not set in test data
integration_issues.note: This is expected behavior - buttons only show when data.header.primary_coach_id exists (line 634 AthletePipelinePanel.js)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/director/actions creates review_request (director only, coach gets 403)
VERIFIED: POST /api/director/actions creates pipeline_escalation with risk_level
VERIFIED: POST /api/director/actions validates type, reason, and risk_level (400 on invalid)
VERIFIED: GET /api/director/actions returns correct summary (total_open, open_critical, open_warning, acknowledged, resolved_recently)
VERIFIED: GET /api/director/actions filters by status query parameter
VERIFIED: GET /api/director/actions for coach only returns actions assigned to that coach
VERIFIED: GET /api/director/actions/athlete/{athlete_id} returns actions for specific athlete
VERIFIED: POST /api/director/actions/{id}/acknowledge transitions status from open to acknowledged
VERIFIED: POST /api/director/actions/{id}/acknowledge returns 400 if already acknowledged
VERIFIED: POST /api/director/actions/{id}/resolve transitions status and saves resolved_note
VERIFIED: POST /api/director/actions/{id}/resolve returns 400 if already resolved
VERIFIED: Coach cannot acknowledge action assigned to different coach (403)
VERIFIED: Athlete cannot access director actions endpoints (403)
VERIFIED: DirectorActionsCard renders in Director Mission Control
VERIFIED: DirectorActionsCard renders in Coach Mission Control
VERIFIED: Pipeline panel opens from Needs Attention card via Pipeline quick action
seed_data_creation: Created 13+ test director actions during backend testing (6 open, 2 acknowledged, 5 resolved)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Director Actions V1 fully implemented and tested. Backend has 5 endpoints: POST /api/director/actions (create), GET /api/director/actions (list with summary), GET /api/director/actions/athlete/{id} (athlete-specific), POST /api/director/actions/{id}/acknowledge, POST /api/director/actions/{id}/resolve. DirectorActionsCard component renders in both DirectorView.js (line 189) and CoachView.js (line 139). Pipeline panel Request Review/Escalate buttons require primary_coach_id to be set on athlete - this is conditionally rendered at line 634 of AthletePipelinePanel.js. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_director_actions.py has comprehensive API tests.
